creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=51d2b6ffd47dc10de90c1061d45d84829bd75e04

commit 51d2b6ffd47dc10de90c1061d45d84829bd75e04
Author:     King John <jinking.this@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2025-01-13 17:15:45 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-01-17 19:32:04 +0000

    x11-fonts/nerd-fonts: update to 3.3.0

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/blob/master/changelog.md#v330

    Breaking

     * Because Devicons are updated some old icons were dropped (replaced)

    Fonts

     * Add Departure Mono @rektdeckard
     * Add Monaspace weight ExtraLight (Italic)
     * Update 0xProto to 2.201 @my4ng
     * Update Intel One Mono to 1.4.0
     * Update Monaspace to v1.101 @Stealthii
     * Fix upstream Gohufont 14 question mark bug

    Icons

     * Switch to devicons/devicon
     * Add Chuck and Vitruvian Man
     * Add Progress Indicators a la Fira Code
     * Update Font Logos to 1.3.0
     * FontAwesome: Scale glyphs a bit smaller
     * Improve Bazel icon @zaucy
     * Improve Ruby and Firebase icons

    Features

     * Add shell based cheat-sheet script @hasecilu
     * Add fontconfig file to SymbolsOnly release archive (for repackagers)
     * Unify configuration files for font-patcher and gotta-patch-em (format
       changed)

    Bugs and improvements

     * Fix Powerline glyphs position and size in some cases
     * Font-patcher: Allow to rehint glyphs via config file
     * Font-patcher: don't double-shrink heavy angle brackets @gibfahn
     * Font-patcher: Fix behavior when trying to patch non-font files
     * Font-patcher: Fix escaping warning
     * Gotta-patch-em: Remove post processing
     * Increase Powerline overlap (big triangles and more)
     * Increase weather icons 'other' icons scale
     * ShareTechMono: Fix fi/fl ligs

    PR:             283505
    Reported by:    jinking.this@gmail.com
    Approved by:    gregf@hugops.pw (maintainer, timeout > 2 weeks)

 x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/Makefile  |   2 +-
 x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/distinfo  |   6 +-
 x11-fonts/nerd-fonts/pkg-plist | 589 +++++++++++++++++++----------------------
 3 files changed, 275 insertions(+), 322 deletions(-)
